title: Ubiquiti UISP-FIBER-OLT-XGS
description: UISP-FIBER-OLT-XGS offers 8x10Gb/s XGS/XG-PON/GPON ports and supports up to 256 clients per port, 2048 clients overall. There are 4x SFP28 uplink ports with speeds up to 25Gb/s. The OLT supports redundant power supply OLT Rack mount kit 2x Power cables
specsSearch: Optics Transfer type GPON, XG-PON, XGS-PON Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (1) 1G (management) PON SFP cages 8 Optical interfaces (4) 1G/10G/25Gbps Serial port RJ45 Power Max. power consumption [W] 70 Power via connector/terminal 230V AC
